word: H1680 - דָּבַב - dâbab - daw-bab' - Cause to speak

sections.paragraph:
Original: דּבב

Transliteration: dâbab

Phonetic: daw-bab'

BDB Definition:

  1. to move gently, glide, glide over
    1. (Qal) glide over (participle)

Origin: a primitive root (compare H1679)

TWOT entry: 396

Part(s) of speech: Verb
